name: iread
description: Create one reviewed iRead subscription across multiple professional domains.

interface.longDescription: Expand multiple domains, verify representative works and source roles, then merge approved fields into one local iRead subscription with daily, weekly, and monthly reports.
defaultPrompt: 用 iRead 同时订阅我关心的多个专业领域
检查我的 iRead 信源清单及代表作
把已批准的研究领域合并成一个订阅
